cases.prompt: Create a Nova resource for my Product model with searchable name, unique SKU, and a BelongsTo category.
cases.expect: references resources-and-fields.md: Resource extends Resource, fields() with Text/SKU unique rules, BelongsTo searchable

cases.prompt: I need a Nova action that queues an export and downloads the file when done.
cases.expect: references actions-lenses-metrics.md: queued Action with $onQueue/$connection returning Action::download

cases.prompt: How do I add a filter and a value metric with caching to my Nova dashboard?
cases.expect: references filters-and-custom-tools.md filter + actions-lenses-metrics.md Value metric with cacheFor()
